entries.content:
PE: Grades 4-6
Lessons specifically created for Grades 1-6. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms

entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
these lessons are optional.

PE: Grades 7-12
Lessons specifically created for Grades 7-12. We do recommend you prioritize the Historical Dance lessons as these are less likely to be obtained elsewhere and also give depth and richness to student's understanding of the time period. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms
